message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #98FB98
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor black

class "Robustness_dia" as Robustness_dia {
  uc_node: UC_node
  nodes: List<Rob_node>
  edges: List<Rob_edge>
  addNode()
  addEdge()
}

class "UC_node" as UC_node

class "Rob_node" as Rob_node {
  name: String
  edges: List<Rob_edge>
}

class "Rob_edge" as Rob_edge {
  name: String
  begin: Rob_node
  end: Rob_node
}

class "Rob_actor" as Rob_actor

class "Rob_boundary" as Rob_boundary {
  layout: Layout
  is_error: bool
}

class "Rob_control" as Rob_control

class "Rob_entity" as Rob_entity {
  format: Format
}

note "Robustness - Rob\nUse Case - UC" as Note1

Robustness_dia --|> UC_node
Robustness_dia --|> Rob_node
Robustness_dia --|> Rob_edge
Rob_node --|> Rob_actor
Rob_node --|> Rob_boundary
Rob_node --|> Rob_control
Rob_node --|> Rob_entity
Rob_node --|> Rob_edge

@enduml
